title: Strata #19 — Ochre Ground Frequency
summary: A horizontal abstract painting from the Strata 2026 series, composed around an ochre and golden field crossed by delicate incised white strata. Small pale geometric forms and a grounding lower band create balance, depth and a contemplative sense of territory.
concept: In Strata #19 — Ochre Ground Frequency, the surface unfolds as a mineral and atmospheric terrain. The fine incised lines suggest subtle strata, routes or fault traces, while the small pale forms act as quiet markers within the field. The painting evokes a space where geological calm, spatial rhythm and silent presence converge.
commercial_note: This work belongs to the Strata 2026 series, a body of abstract paintings centered on territory, fault lines, ground frequency and suspended geometric forms. Its warm ochre palette and horizontal composition give it a serene yet structured presence, making it especially suitable for contemporary interiors, collectors and architectural spaces seeking a refined abstract statement.
